project_summary.project_name: Shops at Katy Trails Retail Building
project_summary.estimator_summary: Secure analysis extracted 11 opening(s) and 4 hardware set(s). Verify against source PDF before bidding.

hardware_set_review.estimator_note: NOTE: G.C. TO COORDINATE WITH LOCAL FIRE MARSHAL IF KNOX BOX IS TO BE PROVIDED ADJACENT TO DOOR FOR FIRE DEPARTMENT ACCESS.

general_notes: CONFIRM DOOR PLACEMENT WITH OWNER PRIOR TO INSTALLATION OF DOORS.
ENSURE EXISTING DOORS HAVE SIMILAR HARDWARE TO THE SPECIFIED HARDWARE.
ALL STOREFRONT ALUMINUM TO MATCH. CONTACT ARCHITECT AND/OR OWNER IF DRAWINGS SPECIFY OTHERWISE ELSEWHERE.
SECURITY DOOR WINDOWS TO HAVE INTEGRAL WIRE MESH
NOTE: G.C. TO COORDINATE WITH LOCAL FIRE MARSHAL IF KNOX BOX IS TO BE PROVIDED ADJACENT TO DOOR FOR FIRE DEPARTMENT ACCESS.
FENESTRATION/GLAZING PERFORMANCE REQUIREMENTS ARE BASED ON THE 2015 IECC
FENESTRATION MUST NOT EXCEED MANDATORY AIR LEAKAGE LIMITS (IECC TABLE 402.5.4)
EXTERIOR FENESTRATIONS/GLAZING SYSTEMS MUST COMPLY WITH LOCAL WIND SPEED REQUIREMENTS, OUTLINED ON CODE SUMMARY SHEET A.101.
PERIMETER GAPS TO MATCH STOREFRONT COLOR.
ANY SILICON AGAINST GLAZING TO BE CLEAR.
REFER TO SHEET A.101 FOR FURTHER INFORMATION ON IECC MINIMUM REQUIREMENTS
SHGC VARIES BASED ON PROJECTION FACTOR. IF ALTERATIONS OCCUR DURING CONSTRUCTION, REFER TO SHEET A.101.
hardware_preamble: CONFIRM DOOR PLACEMENT WITH OWNER PRIOR TO INSTALLATION OF DOORS.
ENSURE EXISTING DOORS HAVE SIMILAR HARDWARE TO THE SPECIFIED HARDWARE.
ALL STOREFRONT ALUMINUM TO MATCH. CONTACT ARCHITECT AND/OR OWNER IF DRAWINGS SPECIFY OTHERWISE ELSEWHERE.
SECURITY DOOR WINDOWS TO HAVE INTEGRAL WIRE MESH

1 EA RIM CYLINDER 20-057 ICX W/ KEYED CONST. CORE 626 SCHLAGE

estimator_notes: Keying notes captured from the drawings (4 line(s)); verify keyway, master structure, cylinder format and key counts.
11 opening(s) extracted from the schedule. Verify all marks against the source PDF before submitting bid.
4 hardware set(s) identified; 4 have a complete extracted item list.
17 general note(s) captured from the door-schedule sheet.
4 hardware-preamble note(s) captured from hardware-set sheet(s).

supply_only_notes: Submittal package: door, frame and hardware schedules with manufacturer cut sheets, keying schedule, electrified hardware riser, anchor templates.
installation_only_notes: Field-measure all openings before fabrication release. Verify rough-opening size, frame anchor type, and floor condition.
Storage and protection of doors / frames / hardware on site is by GC unless otherwise noted.
exclusions_to_consider: Exclude 120 V power, low-voltage cabling, access-control head-end, intrusion detection programming, fire-alarm tie-in (NIC).
Exclude permits, demolition, painting, drywall patching at frame anchors, floor preparation at thresholds.
coordination_items: Attend pre-installation meeting with GC, EC, low-voltage, fire alarm and security trades.
Hold formal keying meeting with owner before cylinder fabrication.
